title: 空回ってて、ごめんなさい

text_block_list.text:
The event T.M. Opera O invited Meisho Doto to is the Tracen Meet,
a competition held multiple times a year to both challenge and
celebrate the students.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And for our showing to be a success, we must rehearse! We shall meet
on the turf course tomorrow at one o'clock sharp! Ta-ta for now, Doto!
Hah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
...Phew. Wh-what a shock... I-I think I lost consciousness for a second
there...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hm? Yes, of co—huh?! D-did O-Ope...Opera O really just... ask me for something?! A-and a battle at that?! Whaaat?!

She's a lot more flustered than I would've expected. Not to mention
the way she was looking at T.M. Opera O with so much... admiration.
Could it be...
choice_data_list: Are you a fan of hers?
Are you a fan of hers?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
N-no, I don't deserve to call myself a fan... It's more like... I-I look up
to her, I suppose...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
M-maybe that's a bit confusing... Um...
W-when I first saw Opera O at our entrance ceremony...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hah ha ha! Look at these decorated walls, the gilded stage, an
auditorium at full capacity! Good to see the school celebrate my
enrollment appropriately!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
To say she stood out would be an understatement. Her laugh echoed
through the halls as she entered, and then...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Listen well, my comrades and rivals! Today, my journey along the road
to victory—

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: She tripped in the middle of her speech.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: A-are you okay?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Can you imagine? Tripping over your own two feet... in front of the whole school... on the first day?! I would've had nightmares for months! But not her...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Haaah ha ha ha ha! Excellent! Could there be more crushing
humiliation than this?! What luck to come across such emotion so
serendipitously!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(Sh-she's not embarassed? In fact... sh-she seems even more majestic
than before... A-amazing... H-how?)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: (I-I want to be like that too!)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Opera O asking me for help... was likely—no, probably—no, surely—no, definitely pure coincidence...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
B-but even so... if she thinks I can somehow be of help to her, I-I want
to do my very best!

The next day, curiosity gets the better of me, and I decide to watch
Meisho Doto and T.M. Opera O. However, something's amiss when I
get there...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hah ha ha! To think she would be thirty minutes late on our very first
day!

Recalling her overall clumsiness, I start to worry that she may have
fallen and injured herself somewhere. But just then...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I-I'M SO SORRY!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
F-forgive me! Prepping took me a little longer than I thought! I-I'll
enter the gate right away! I'm so, so, soooo sorry!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hold it right there, Doto. Do you truly believe we can race with you in
such a state?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eep! I-I-I mean... that is... I'm sorry!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: You're still wearing your slippers.

And so, Meisho Doto rushes back to the dorms to retrieve her running
shoes. Just a little longer, and this race can begin...
...Or so I thought. Night has fallen.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hah ha ha ha! What incredible tardiness!
Too tardy if you ask me... Surely something happened this time—

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I'm so, so, so, so, so sorry!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Really, truly! I can't even begin to explain!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
W-well... I-I was so excited yesterday that I decided to polish my
shoes... But when I was done, I put them in a different place than
usual. So when I went looking...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Are they here? What about here? What about over here?! Surely
they're right here! Why aren't they here?! WHERE ARE THEY?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eventually I did manage to find them, but...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Th-the cleats fell off! Whyyy?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ah... I must've reapplied them too many times last night... The holes
from the nails are too big! B-but that means... Ohhh, I'm such an idiot!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
S-so I had to go buy new shoes, which took even longer... S-sorry
doesn't even begin to cover—
choice_data_list: Why didn't you just call us?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ah, y-you're right! I should've just—Wait, no, it's a little late for that
now! What's done is done, and I-I need to make up for being so tardy!
choice_data_list:
Well, it's a little late to race now. Should we try
again some other day?

text_block_list.text:
It's already nighttime, and surely Opera O is sick of waiting. But when
I look over at her, she only smiles.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh, a few accidents will not sway the heart of the Overlord! Besides,
look yonder at the moon! O how she shines! She urges us to run, so
run we shall!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you, Opera O...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(Th-then for your sake, I have to at least be a good running partner! I
have to be useful!)

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh... You're showing true grit there, Doto! But I will not falter!
Haaah!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Y-yaaah!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hngyah?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
...Ha! Well, villain? Did you enjoy that small sample of my—oh? Did
you trip?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm so sorry! Not only did I make you wait for me until it was pitch
black outside, but I couldn't even give you a proper race!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
H-how can I even begin to make this up to you... Ah, I-I know, I
brought th-these refreshments with me...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Although preparing this was another reason I was late... I'm sorry...

Meisho Doto hands over a hot cup of coffee and all is well... for
about half a second.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: This... isn't coffee, is it? Tastes more like soy sauce to me!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
S-s-soy sauce?! Oh no, now I've done it! Um... Uh... I-I also brought
this towel, which I sprayed with a lovely fragrance! Please take it
and—

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Cough, cough! T-the stench... It burns...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: EEEK! A-are you okay?! ARE YOU OKAY?! OPERA O!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hic... Sniff... I-I can't believe I caused the Opera O to faint...
choice_data_list: At least it wasn't anything serious.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: S-still... I thought I'd finally be useful for once, but in the end... all I did was cause trouble... Sniff...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I-I really am the most worthless Umamusume everrr!

Doto races off, distraught by her own failures. It's clear she put a lot
of effort into today, so I understand why she's upset... Concerned, I
race after her.
